identification.title: 1. Identification details
identification.intro: In compliance with applicable regulations, users are informed that this website is owned by:

purpose.title: 2. Purpose
purpose.text: The purpose of this website is to provide information about classes in the Feldenkrais Method and to allow interested persons to get in touch.

termsOfUse.title: 3. Terms of use
termsOfUse.text1: Access to and use of this website gives the visitor the status of user and implies acceptance of the conditions set out herein.
termsOfUse.text2: The user undertakes to use the website lawfully and without causing harm.

intellectualProperty.title: 4. Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.text: All website content (texts, images, etc.) is owned by the owner or used with authorization and may not be reproduced without permission.

liability.title: 5. Liability
liability.intro: The owner is not responsible for:
items: Improper use of the website content by users
Possible technical errors or interruptions of the service
Content of external links over which the owner has no control

links.title: 6. Links
links.text: This website may contain links to external pages. The owner is not responsible for the content or policies of such sites.

dataProtection.title: 7. Data protection
dataProtection.text: Personal data collected through this website will be processed in accordance with the Privacy Policy.

modifications.title: 8. Modifications
modifications.text: The owner reserves the right to modify the content of the website without prior notice.

applicableLaw.title: 9. Applicable law
applicableLaw.text: The relationship between the user and the owner shall be governed by Spanish law.
